evidence: Schema-validity class fix verified on merged main (5dc2f2fc) with the full live remediation cycle demonstrated on the active substrate: context-validate's new sweep reported status invalid with all 14 story items named (block_schema_invalid, item ids, additionalProperties) — the exact damage the pre-fix verdict missed; update --dryRun then predicted story:resynced against the widened catalog (the same-version re-validation passing in simulation); the live update resynced; validate-block-items --block story returned valid:true; context-validate returned to warnings-only with zero errors. Gates: npm run build / check / test all exit 0. The sweep also caught a real filing omission live (a task missing its governing-convention edge), corrected on the spot.

criteria_results.criterion: context-validate reports schema-invalid blocks with block/item/keyword; live story invalidity reported before remediation, baseline after
criteria_results.evidence: Live: status invalid + 14 block_schema_invalid errors naming STORY-001..014 and additionalProperties; post-resync: warnings-only, zero errors. Tests: sweep valid/invalid cells + stamped-envelope migration-aware + unresolvable-version surfacing + pointer-less graceful skip

criteria_results.evidence: Pre-existing same-version resync + idempotence tests green with enum-valid fixtures; live: the story resync itself (items valid against the widened body) proceeded as resynced
